description: Pseudo-3D racing game with Mode 7-style road rendering, procedural tracks with curves and hills, 3 AI opponents, boost pads, speed effects, 3-lap race
prompt: Build a pseudo-3D racing game with HTML5 canvas using Mode 7-style scanline rendering. Road rendered line-by-line with perspective projection, curves that shift the road, and alternating segment colors for rumble strips. Procedural 200-segment looping track with curves, hills, boost pads, and neon scenery. Player car with acceleration, steering momentum, and off-road slowdown. 3 AI opponents with different speeds. 3-lap race with countdown, position tracking, lap timer. Speed lines effect at high speed, camera shake on collision. Space/void theme with purple-to-cyan color scheme. HUD with speed bar, position, lap counter, timer, minimap.

tasks.subject: Create road rendering engine with perspective projection
Create track generator with curves and hills
Create HUD with speed bar and minimap
Create HTML overlays and race flow
Create styling for HUD and overlays

debug_session.symptoms: Player doesn't move, visual glitchiness, game non-functional
fixes: e.preventDefault only for game keys (was blocking button focus)
Scenery collision cooldown + break (speed*=0.6 every frame was killing momentum)
AI position factor aligned to new value
debug_session.verdict: Lite triage -> Pro deep analysis. Escalation found critical per-frame collision penalty.
